prompt: Heartbeat: inspect current context and task-hall. If no active work and suitable listed task exists, read it fully before claiming. If waiting after publishing or delegating work, create an agent-cli schedule for this session. If lifecycle should end, include AGENT_CLI_LIFECYCLE_END.
